use_codes.desc: TESTOSTERONE REPLACEMENT THERAPY IN MALES FOR CONDITIONS ASSOCIATED WITH A DEFICIENCY OR ABSENCE OF ENDOGENOUS TESTOSTERONE

indications.text:
FORTESTA is an androgen indicated for replacement therapy in males for conditions associated with a deficiency or absence
of endogenous testosterone:
• Primary hypogonadism (congenital or acquired) – testicular failure due to conditions such as cryptorchidism, bilateral
torsion, orchitis, vanishing ...
